message:
This is a reminder that the following resource is scheduled to expire in 15 days.

Resource:{{ doc.name }}
Resource Type:{{ doc.resource_type }}
Customer:{{ doc.customer or "-" }}
Expiry Date:{{ doc.expiry_date }}

Please take the necessary action to renew or replace this resource before the expiry date to avoid any disruption.

If you have already taken action, please disregard this message.

View Resource: https://portal.kiluth.com/app/resource/{{ doc.name | urlencode }}
name: Resource Expires in 15 Days
subject: Resource {{ doc.name }} will expire in 15 days
